facebook.content:
Hey church family, 

I want to remind you of this precious time we get to spend together in worship. Every first Saturday of the month, we gather in person at 12 Noon, at our Southfield campus, 24301 Telegraph. It's an hour of pure praise and adoration, where we connect with the heart of God. 

And, if you can't make it in person, don't worry. Our online community comes together daily at 8:15 AM, Monday through Friday, on Facebook Live.

Hey church family, 

I want to remind you of this precious time we get to spend together in worship. Every first Saturday of the month, we gather in person at 12 Noon, at our Southfield campus, 24301 Telegraph. It's an hour of pure praise and adoration, where we connect with the heart of God. 

And, if you can't make it in person, don't worry. Our online community comes together daily at 8:15 AM, Monday through Friday, on Facebook Live.

Join us for worship
https://increasingfaith.net/visit.html

#Faith #KingdomLiving #JesusIsLord

instagram.content:
Come join us in worship! 

Every 1st Saturday, 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI, we gather in person to lift up the Name above all names.

Or, if you can't join us in person, join us online!

Daily Hour of Power, Mon-Fri at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live. Let's worship together!

Who's joining us this month?
